hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-heading font-semibold tracking-tight text-stone-900 leading-tight
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-heading font-medium tracking-tight text-stone-900
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-heading uppercase tracking-[0.15em] text-stone-500 font-medium

layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl (for large cards), rounded-xl (for smaller widgets), rounded-full (for buttons/pills)
layout_and_spacing.shadows: shadow-sm for default state, shadow-md for hover state. Avoid heavy shadows to maintain organic feel.

components.buttons: rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors duration-200 ease-in-out
components.cards: bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-2xl p-6 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-md hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-stone-300
components.inputs: bg-stone-50 border border-stone-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-sky-500/20 focus:border-sky-500 transition-all
components.badges: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-stone-100 text-stone-800
components.mode_switcher: Use Shadcn Tabs. Override background to a soft stone-100. Active tab gets white background with subtle shadow. When Animal mode is active, active tab text becomes lime-700. When Human mode, active text is sky-700.
components.timeline: Vertical line border-l-2 border-stone-200. Timeline items with circular icon markers. Use soft backgrounds for the uploaded report cards.
components.chat_ui: Soft bubble corners (rounded-2xl, except for the tail corner). User: bg-stone-100. Bot: bg-sky-50 (Human) or bg-lime-50 (Animal).

motion.lists: staggered entrance animations (Framer Motion) for timeline items and hospital cards

icons.style: stroke-width: 1.5, slightly rounded, organic feel. Use text-sky-600 or text-lime-600 depending on mode.

images.description: Abstract warm sand texture, perfect for hero section background with text overlay
Indian farmer woman with a cow in the field, use in Farmer/Animal mode sections
Doctor checking patient in clinic, use for Human Health mode and hospital recommendations
Flat lay of natural ingredients and herbs, use for Ayurveda and holistic medicine sections
Modern hospital building, use for Cost Estimator and Hospital Recommendation cards

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Implement a seamless Dual Mode Switcher at the top of the dashboard. When switching between Human and Animal modes, update the primary accent colors globally (Sky Blue -> Moss Green).
Use 'Outfit' for all headings and 'DM Sans' for body text. Add these via Google Fonts in the HTML head.
Build the dashboard using a 'Bento Grid' layout. Keep padding generous (p-6 or p-8) and use rounded-2xl to maintain the organic, accessible feel.
For the Cost Estimator, use horizontal progress bars or charts from Shadcn/Recharts to clearly show Min, Avg, and Max costs for treatments.
The Government Schemes Engine should be visually distinct (perhaps an amber/ochre accent card) to draw attention to financial aid.
Implement the Emergency mode button with a pulsing animation using the defined orange/terracotta accent color.
DO NOT use generic purple/violet gradients. Stick strictly to the organic palette (Sand, Stone, Sky Blue, Moss Green, Terracotta).
Ensure the UI is responsive and mobile-first, prioritizing touch-friendly targets for rural users.
Use the provided image URLs exclusively for media. Do not use placeholders.
